sentences.text: 'Ah!' said the Miller, 'there is no work more enjoyable than the work one does for others.'
'It is certainly a great privilege to hear you speak,' answered little Hans, sitting down and wiping his forehead, 'a very great privilege.'
But I am afraid I will never have such beautiful ideas as you have.
'Oh!' replied the Miller, 'you will have wonderful ideas if you keep working hard.'
